title: Smoker Closes In
description: On pages 13–16, smoker closes in focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.
scene: On pages 13–16, smoker closes in focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Captain! CPT. Smoker! It's an emergency!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: out in the plaza, Pirates have...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: You just barging in here is only making it harder for me to concentrate.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I've gotta do things at my own pace,

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Marine Head- quarters Captain SMOKER THE WHITE HUNTER

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: So? What seems to be the problem?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: pirates are running wild in the town square, right?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Send the first unit down to the harbour,

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: While a second unit will secretly set up a perimeter around the town square.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: The rest will wait within shooting distance for further orders. That'll be all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, now. Don't run or you'll end up dropping it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Seems like my pants ate your ice cream.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Here's some money so go buy yourself a 5 scoop ice cream next time.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Sorry for being late, CPT. Smoker!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Tashigi! Where the hell have you been!?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry, I'll get changed right aw...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Oh, thank you very much, Sergeant!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I was late because I was caught off-guard by a shocking situation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's because you need more discipline!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: come along, then. We've got ourselves an emergency to deal with.

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
